lines: Dr. A. Cula! Thank every harbour authority.
This ship is sinking, the lifeboats are unlabelled, and Mr. Swine has taken the map to Japan.

states.line: Find Mr. Murrow. He knows what the case is actually about. I know only that the hull is making financial noises.
The procedural binder is in the archive, unless it has finally achieved sentience and crawled below deck.
The binder and the memo. Excellent. Two anchors. One may crush the deck, but morally anchors.

idle_flavor: For the first time today, the ship is not actively sinking. It is merely making exploratory gurgling noises.
How goes the voyage? Are we navigating toward justice, or have we struck another procedural reef?
We cannot sail into court with a hole in the hull and optimism as our only oar.
